title: Iran activates air defenses as Trump faces congressional deadline
snippet: Tehran air defenses activated Thursday night for ~20 minutes to counter small aircraft and reconnaissance drones. Situation returned to 'normal.' Timing coincides with WPR deadline and CENTCOM military options briefing. Heightened alert despite ceasefire.
tag_reason: 테헤란 방공망 가동은 5/1 전후 신규 군사적 긴장 사건
